    rw [pow_succ, pow_two]; exact MDifferentiable.mul hH₂ (MDifferentiable.mul hH₂ hH₂)

    rw [pow_two]; exact MDifferentiable.mul hH₄ hH₄

  have h2 : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₂ * H₄) := MDifferentiable.mul hH₂ hH₄
  have h3 : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (5 * H₂ * H₄) := MDifferentiable.const_smul h2 5
  have h4 : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (5 * H₄ ^ 2) := MDifferentiable.const_smul hH₄_sq 5
  have h5 : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (2 * H₂ ^ 2 + 5 * H₂ * H₄) := MDifferentiable.add h1 h3
  have h6 : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (2 * H₂ ^ 2 + 5 * H₂ * H₄ + 5 * H₄ ^ 2) := MDifferentiable.add h5 h4
  exact MDifferentiable.mul hH₂_cubed h6
